violations.text: Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of soil residue and biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized, and ice from small ice machine will be used. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Cooked pasta was placed hot in the refrigerator in covered plastic containers greater than four inches deep. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/21/2025
Food observed stored on shelves less than 6 inches from the floor. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 09/21/2025

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025

Single service items observed stored on the floor and on shelves less than 6 inches above the floor. Single service items must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2025
The hand sink in the kitchen is in poor repair, with the hot water nonfunctional during inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. PIC stated applications have been mailed to RIDOH. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2024

The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2024

Open employees' beverage containers observed stored in food preparation areas. Employees shall not drink from open beverage containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024
The hand-washing sink in the toilet room was lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2024

Pasta, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024
Duxelle, garlic sauce, caesar dressing, peppercorn dressing were marked with a date exceeding 7 days. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Pasta was placed hot in the refrigerator in covered containers greater than four inches deep. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024

Working containers of ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024
Food observed stored on the floor in the prep area. Food observed outside on the ground along building. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024
Single service items observed stored on the floor in the food prep area. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine, and sugar bin have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2024
The dumpster area has an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, discarded items, and debris. Dumpster area must be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2024
The wall fan above the dishwasher area has an accumulation of dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2024
The floor in the food prep area has an accumulation of leaves and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024
